detail.description:
🧱 Block Craft 3D: Realm Builder is a creative sandbox game where you can explore a vast block world, craft resources, and build your own realm from the ground up.

🌍 Start with a small land and turn it into a unique world. Place blocks freely, design buildings, shape terrain, and expand your realm without limits.

⛏️ Collect materials, craft new blocks, and unlock more building options as you grow your realm. There are no strict rules – just pure creativity and freedom.

🏰 Build houses, tower
